releaseNotes: Audit Log: every action is now recorded with who, what, when — viewable by all users, auto-deleted after 30 days
Auto-deploy: backend CI/CD now deploys to somee.com on every push to main
UX: version displayed under Check for Updates button in sidebar
Error handling: loadThresholds wrapped in try/catch, updateOrderStatus propagates errors
UX: search debouncing, logout confirmation, loading states in orders and wizards
Code quality: removed dead code, fixed MaterialSerivce typo, localized hardcoded strings
